pending_ci.reason: The v0.1.1 version bump is not yet merged to main, so no green ci/golden run exists for a v0.1.1 release commit. This record claims no commit or CI evidence it cannot yet have.
required_before_pre_tag: Merge the v0.1.1 version bump to main with green ci/golden.
Set candidate_commit to the merged main commit SHA.
Add candidate_commit_source with the merging pull request and merged_at.
Add at least two green ci/golden run URLs for the candidate commit under ci_evidence.
Record a strict release-candidate dry-run snapshot under dry_run_evidence (python3 scripts/check_local_alpha_release_candidate.py from clean main matching origin/main).
Flip status from pending_ci to pre_tag_candidate.

non_claims: No source-control tag has been created.

next_required_effect: Merge the v0.1.1 bump to main with green CI, upgrade this record to pre_tag_candidate, then obtain maintainer approval before creating or pushing v0.1.1.
